creator: lboehne@damogran.de
text:
Typo in the subject, that should of course be devel/py-distorm. I also
think the .shar archive broke when I pasted it into the webform, you can
download it at http://www.damogran.de/ports/distorm/py-distorm.shar

I have not done much porting, any feedback is welcome.

Lutz
